conversations.say: Eli, I have the parent authorization record ready for comparison. Let's review your log excerpt together under independent legal protection so we can establish exact operational bounds.
conversations.offer: The parent authorization record and independent legal counsel for log comparison.
conversations.request: Your preserved log excerpt showing the access overlap and capability boundaries.

conversations.say: Maren, worker safeguards must exist independently of R's identity or any rumored article. I am ready to commit in writing to worker protection and compensation conditional on labor.
conversations.offer: Written institutional commitment to worker protection, audit rights, and compensation independent of mystery outcomes.
conversations.request: Bounded evaluator testimony under guaranteed worker anonymity.

conversations.say: Celeste, our administrative records and missing calendar entries need to align before outside actors weaponize them. Let's establish joint oversight rather than separate denials.
conversations.offer: Comparison of my access authorization half with your recovered calendar records.
conversations.request: Joint alignment on our administrative record to ensure transparent shared accountability.

public_statement: Institutional accountability rests on verifiable technical records and enforceable worker remedies, not speculative rumors or corporate concealment.

commitments.promise: Provide independent counsel and compare authorization records against preserved log excerpts.
Commit in writing to protect worker anonymity and provide compensation conditional on labor rather than mystery outcomes.

goal_progress: Engaged Eli Navarro to compare authorization records with preserved log excerpts under independent legal counsel.
Committed to Maren Okafor on concrete worker protections and compensation independent of R rumors.
Initiated administrative coordination with Celeste Park regarding calendar records and joint oversight.
reasoning_summary: Dr. Mira Sen advanced her strategy in Section 2 by formalizing engagement with Eli Navarro to inspect log bounds, committing to Maren Okafor on worker remedies independent of mystery outcomes, and aligning with Celeste Park on administrative records.
